questions.question: Describe the main causes of severe air pollution in New Delhi in 2017. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the role of human activities

questions.question: What were the health impacts of the Great Smog of London in 1952? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Compare with modern-day expectations of air quality standards

questions.question: Explain how particulate matter (PM) contributes to air pollution. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the effects on human health and the environment
